/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,librobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o librobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_interfaces/msg/_position_s.c.o CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/robot_interfaces/msg/_robot_state_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/projects/robo/build/robot_interfaces:/opt/ros/lyrical/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.14.so librobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so librobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librosidl_buffer.so /opt/ros/lyrical/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/lyrical/lib
